data.title: Datavault AI's shares surge 23% after hours with $150 million Bitcoin investment for supercomputer, reaching $1.07 intraday high.
data.description: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) saw a significant increase in its shares during Thursday's after-hours trading following a $150 million investment in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) to develop a supercomputer. DVLT's stock is currently experiencing a notable surge, with the price reaching an intraday high of $1.07, representing a 64% jump from the previous close. The stock rallied over 23% in the after-hours session, building on its gains from the regular trading hours. This investment is expected to play a strategic role in enhancing the company's infrastructure. For more details on the company's fundamentals, interested individuals can refer to the full story accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: pcc Practice Builder™ expands into chiropractic and dentistry markets after 14 yrs in podiatry marketing, offering digital solutions.
data.description: Metuchen, New Jersey – On September 25, 2025, pcc Practice Builder™, an established leader in podiatry marketing for over 14 years, revealed its entry into the chiropractic and dentistry sectors. This expansion signifies a strategic move to offer their successful digital marketing strategies to a broader audience.

data.title: New promo video "A Better You, A Better Jing'an" released by Jing'an district of Shanghai, showcasing its charm.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Beijing, the English edition of the latest promotional video showcasing Jing'an District in Shanghai has been unveiled. Titled "A Better You, A Better Jing'an," the video highlights genuine moments, emotional narratives, and creative approaches. The video aims to attract more viewers and visitors to the district through its captivating content.
